title: BSNC Shareholder and U.S. Marine Corps Veteran Jon Kasgnoc Hired as Recruiting Manager and Compensation Administrator
summary: BSNC shareholder Jonathan “Jon” Kasgnoc joined BSNC in the summer of 2022 as Recruiting Manager and Compensation Administrator. title: Chugach Government Solutions, LLC (CGS) acquires Vector Planning & Services, Inc. (VPSI) and expands technical services division capabilities
